title: Kandytoys Unicorn Flash Stick - 2 Assorted Colours
features: 15" fibre optic light up unicorn wand sword girls party glow magic Christmas toy
Available in 3 colours: pink, blue or silver handle, 1 will be sent at random
Push the button and the wand will light up in assorted colours. There are 3 different light up sequences
Works with 4x ag13 batteries (included), not recommended for children under the age of 6 years
